title: Circuit takes long time to read (and synth)
body:
## Steps to reproduce the issue

`~/yosys/master/yosys -p "read_verilog -icells test8.v; synth_xilinx"`

https://raw.githubusercontent.com/YosysHQ/yosys-tests/xc7srl/architecture/synth_xilinx_srl/test8.v

## Expected behavior

Fast completion.

## Actual behavior

```
End of script. Logfile hash: ab53e7229e
CPU: user 280.04s system 23.21s, MEM: 5129.39 MB total, 3381.36 MB resident
Yosys 0.8+407 (git sha1 1e5f072c, clang 6.0.0-1ubuntu2 -fPIC -Os)
Time spent: 38% 12x opt_clean (116 sec), 15% 18x read_verilog (46 sec), ...
280.25user 23.39system 5:04.09elapsed 99%CPU (0avgtext+0avgdata 4103612maxresident)k
```
